## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (and I added/updated tests for behavior changes)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if the public API or behavior changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or discussed in an issue first)
